name: peerit
description: A peer-to-peer Reddit that runs as a P2P site inside PearBrowser.

scripts.test: node test/smoke.mjs && node test/gossip.mjs && node test/bridge.mjs && node test/bridge-convergence.mjs && node test/runtime.mjs && node test/relay-roster.mjs && node test/dht-adapter.mjs && node test/outbox-head.mjs && node test/relay-pool.mjs && node test/head-floor.mjs && node test/directory.mjs
scripts.dht:deps: npm i --no-save corestore@6 hypercore@10 hyperbee@2 hyperswarm@4 protomux b4a compact-encoding sodium-javascript random-access-web @hyperswarm/dht-relay @hyperswarm/testnet random-access-memory
